name: Iso11783AppNmtIndication
title: Iso11783AppNmtIndication
syntax: dword Iso11783AppNmtIndication( long busHandle, long address, long flag );
description: This function is called when an ECU claims n address or an ECU loses its address. The function is also called, if no ECU was created yet.
With Iso11783GetRxData() the device name can be copied to a buffer.
